Workstation

Game Mode
  • Number of Accessible Workstations
  • Minimum Aisle Width
  • Minimum Desk Counter Width
  • Minimum Vertical Legroom Space
Code Reference

C. Inside Buildings
15. Workstations
15.4 These workstations shall include desk counters with a minimum vertical legroom space of 700 mm and a counter depth of 480 mm.
